description: The welcome screen exposes profile, project, and model choices before the first message without clearly explaining the scope or consequence of each selection.
expected: Users should understand what each pre-chat choice changes and whether it is optional.
actual: The controls are visible but mostly self-labeled, leaving users to infer whether they affect defaults, the next turn only, or deeper runtime behavior.
suggested_fix: Add short scope labels or inline helper text for profile, project, and model selectors on the welcome screen.
